title: Manila、Metro Manila — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Manila、Metro Manila的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Manila是Metro Manila的一個城市，人口約1,846,000。The Philippines’ historic capital and cultural heart, a bustling metropolis where centuries-old churches meet modern skyscrapers.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
